description:
Process and its TLS are runtime state, not codegen. Move to runtime.rs (where Runtime already lives) or a new src/process.rs. CompiledModule stays in ir_codegen.rs and references the moved type.

## Acceptance

- cargo test green.
- ir_codegen.rs no longer defines Process or CURRENT_PROCESS.
- Existing imports updated.
title: Move Process struct + CURRENT_PROCESS TLS out of ir_codegen.rs
